cognito.userpoolresourceserver.CfnAbout:
The `AWS::Cognito::UserPoolResourceServer` resource creates a new OAuth2.0 resource server and defines custom scopes in it.

**Note**  
If you don't specify a value for a parameter, Amazon Cognito sets it to a default value.

cognito.userpoolresourceserver.Identifie.Description: A unique resource server identifier for the resource server. This could be an HTTPS endpoint where the resource server is located. For example: `https://my-weather-api.example.com`.

cognito.userpoolresourceserver.Name.Description: A friendly name for the resource server.

cognito.userpoolresourceserver.Scopes.Description: A list of scopes. Each scope is a map with keys `ScopeName` and `ScopeDescription`.

cognito.userpoolresourceserver.UserPoolI.Description: The user pool ID for the user pool.
